data: {"generalSituation":"Under the influence of a southerly airstream and an anticyclone aloft, the weather will be mainly fine and hot over the coast of Guangdong in the next couple of days. A trough of low pressure is expected to edge closer to the coast of southern China on Friday. There will be a few showers over the region with chance of thunderstorms over inland areas. Under the influence of upper-air disturbances, there will still be a few showers over the coast of Guangdong during the weekend to early next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260415","week":"Wednesday","forecastWind":"South force 3.","forecastWeather":"Sunny intervals.
